tasks: Create /root/rhcsa10-etc.tar.gz as a gzip archive containing /etc/hosts and /etc/fstab.
hints: Use tar -tzf to inspect gzip archives.
checks: test -f /root/rhcsa10-etc.tar.gz && file /root/rhcsa10-etc.tar.gz | grep -qi gzip && tar -tzf /root/rhcsa10-etc.tar.gz | grep -Eq 'etc/(hosts|fstab)'
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: Create /root/rhcsa10-etc.tar.gz as a gzip archive containing /etc/hosts
